changelog: Fix: runPKill no longer blocks the UI during session start/stop
Fix: Thumbnail fetching now routes through bypass proxy (works on blocked networks)
Fix: Game search spinner no longer gets stuck when search is cancelled
Fix: Cache cleaner preserves active Roblox log when game is running
Fix: FastFlag profiles now persist after applying
Fix: Player tracker no longer shows false positives from log noise
Fix: Game history now records correct session duration
